meta.title: The Garage Jávea — Premium car care, import & sales on the Costa Blanca
meta.description: Discreet, multilingual specialists for high-performance maintenance, turnkey Spanish import and curated sales in Jávea.

hero.headline: The quiet specialist for the car you care about.
hero.lead: Certified maintenance, turnkey import and considered sales — handled end to end, in four languages, by people who simply get it.

services.title: Three things, done properly.
services.lead: No upsell, no theatre. Mechanical precision and the paperwork to match.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & ITV
maintenance.body: Dealer-level diagnostics for Porsche, Ferrari, Aston Martin and AMG. Manufacturer warranty preserved; ITV prepared and passed.

import.title: Import & Export
import.body: Turnkey Spanish matriculación: transport, customs, technical sheets and plates. From a UK or German driveway to a Jávea one.

sales.title: Sales & Sourcing
sales.body: A small, honest collection — and sourcing of specific cars to order, with provenance you can stand behind.

calc.title: Estimate your Spanish registration tax
calc.lead: A fast indication of the Impuesto de Matriculación, based on value and CO₂.
calc.disclaimer: Indicative only. We confirm the exact figure from the Hacienda tables for your vehicle.

stock.title: A few cars worth the drive.
stock.lead: Each one checked, documented and ready for Spanish roads.

car-1.description: A 992 GT3 Touring in flawless order — naturally aspirated, PCCB, full PPF. Imported and registered, clean ITV.

car-2.description: An F8 Tributo with a carbon-heavy build sheet, authenticated from a private collection and on clean Spanish plates.

car-3.tagline: An English gentleman with a wild side
car-3.description: Vantage V8 Roadster in British Racing Green — adaptive damping, sport exhaust, turnkey and ITV-ready.

car-4.description: AMG GT C Roadster with the Dynamic Plus package and Burmester sound. Imported and registered on green plates.

about.title: Showroom polish. Workshop precision.
body: Based in the Marina Alta, The Garage Jávea pairs Dutch and German technical rigour with Spanish warmth. A multilingual team that treats your car — and your trust — with care.
We skip the sales pitch. We log every service to the manufacturer, document every import, and keep our word.

points.title: Multilingual, by default
points.body: Fluent in Dutch, English, German and Spanish — no language barrier, no surprises.

points.title: OEM-level diagnostics
points.body: Dealer-grade equipment; warranties kept fully intact.

points.title: Turnkey paperwork
points.body: Customs, ITV and DGT registration — we coordinate all of it.

news-1.title: Open day — summer 2026
news-1.excerpt: An afternoon of live diagnostics, a curated showcase and free import & ITV advice in Jávea.

news-2.title: A GT2 RS, imported in six days
news-2.excerpt: How we matriculated a Weissach-spec 911 from Munich to Jávea — and saved €12,000 in tax.

contact.title: Come by the workshop.
contact.lead: Stop in to talk through a service, an import or a car you have in mind. An appointment is appreciated.

advisor.title: AI Advisor
advisor.intro: Hello — ask me about Spanish import taxes, sourcing, transport or booking a service.
advisor.placeholder: How do I import from the UK?
advisor.error: We're having a brief connection issue. Please call us at +34 965 020 442.

footer.tagline: Certified maintenance · turnkey import · curated sales.
